overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio Corporate Bond ETF (SPBO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of investment-grade US corporate bonds aiming to provide broad, diversified exposure to the space. SPBO was launched on Apr 6, 2011 and is issued by State Street.
